Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

@NullMarked package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.
  • Related Packages

    Description

  • Class
    Description
    AbstractFeatureStrategy
     
    AssumesInstantiator
    This class implements custom instantiation of if-formulas.
    BuiltInRuleAppContainer
    Instances of this class are immutable
    ComponentStrategy
     
    ComponentStrategy.StrategyAspect
     
    FIFOStrategy
    Trivial implementation of the Strategy interface that uses only the goal time to determine the cost of a RuleApp.
    FIFOStrategy.Factory
     
    FindTacletAppContainer
    Instances of this class are immutable
    FocussedBreakpointRuleApplicationManager
    A rule app manager that ensures that rules are only applied to a certain subterm within the proof (within a goal).
    FocussedRuleApplicationManager
    A rule app manager that ensures that rules are only applied to a certain subterm within the proof (within a goal).
    FOLStrategy
    Strategy for general FOL rules.
    IBreakpointStopCondition
    Defines the basic functionality of an StopCondition which stops applying rules when at least one IBreakpoint is hit.
    IfInstantiationCachePool
    Direct-mapped cache of lists of formulas (potential instantiations of if-formulas of taclets) that were modified after a certain point of time
    IfInstantiationCachePool.AssumesInstantiationCache
     
    IntegerStrategy
    This strategy implements reasoning for integer arithmetics.
    IntegerStrategyFactory
    Factory for IntegerStrategy.
    IntroducedSymbolBy
     
    JavaCardDLStrategy
    This strategy is the catch-all for Java related features that are either cross-cutting or one of the features that do not fit well into any other strategy.
    JavaCardDLStrategyFactory
    Factory for JavaCardDLStrategy.
    JFOLStrategy
    This strategy extends the classical FOLStrategy with heuristics for quantifier instantiation based on E-matching, which involves normalization of quantified formulas, as well as term features depending on integer theory.
    JFOLStrategyFactory
    Factory for JFOLStrategy.
    ModularJavaDLStrategy
    Combines a list of component strategies ComponentStrategy into a unified strategy.
    ModularJavaDLStrategyFactory
    Creates a ModularJavaDLStrategy and handles strategy settings relevant to it.
    NoFindTacletAppContainer
    Instances of this class are immutable
    QueueRuleApplicationManager
    Implementation of RuleApplicationManager that stores possible RuleApps in a priority queue.
    ResponsibleStrategyCache
    A cache for the strategies responsible for a given Rule and RuleSet.
    RuleAppContainer
    Container for RuleApp instances with cost as determined by a given Strategy.
    RuleAppCostCollector
    Interface for collecting RuleApps, together with their assigned cost.
    SimpleFilteredStrategy
    Trivial implementation of the Strategy interface that uses only the goal time to determine the cost of a RuleApp.
    StaticFeatureCollection
    Collection of strategy features that can be accessed statically.
    Strategy<Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>>
    Generic interface for evaluating the cost of a RuleApp with regard to a specific strategy
    StrategyFactory
    Interface for creating Strategy instances.
    StrategyProperties
     
    StringStrategy
    Strategy for string related rules.
    StringStrategyFactory
    Creates StringStrategy.
    SymExStrategy
    Strategy for symbolic execution rules.
    SymExStrategyFactory
    Creates SymExStrategy.
    TacletAppContainer
    Instances of this class are immutable
